whyUseful: Highest Handiwork level in the game at Lv4, dramatically speeds up all crafting. Also has Mining Lv4, making it a dual powerhouse for both crafting and ore gathering.
keyTrait: Handiwork Lv4 + Mining Lv4

howToGet.details: Breed Penking + Bushi. Also catchable as an Alpha Boss in the Desert region.

whyUseful: The only pal with Kindling Lv4. One Jormuntide Ignis at your furnace dramatically outpaces any other fire worker.
keyTrait: Kindling Lv4 (only pal with this level)

howToGet.details: Breed Jormuntide + Blazamut. Cannot be caught in the wild.

whyUseful: The only pal with Generating Electricity Lv4, powerful enough to power an entire late-game base alone. Also has Handiwork Lv2 and Transporting Lv3.
keyTrait: Generating Electricity Lv4 (only pal with this level)

howToGet.details: Breed Grizzbolt + Relaxaurus. Also caught at No. 3 Wildlife Sanctuary.

whyUseful: Best Planting pal at Lv4, also has Gathering Lv3, Handiwork Lv3, and Medicine Production Lv3. Top all-around base worker for farming setups.
keyTrait: Planting Lv4 + Gathering Lv3 + Medicine Production Lv3

howToGet.details: Breed Mossanda + Petallia. Also caught at No. 2 Wildlife Sanctuary.

whyUseful: Has Mining Lv4 — the highest mining level available. Also has Kindling Lv3, making it excellent for late-game ore and smelting before getting Jormuntide Ignis.
keyTrait: Mining Lv4 + Kindling Lv3

howToGet.details: Scorching Mineshaft Alpha Boss (southwest of Foot of the Volcano waypoint) or No. 3 Wildlife Sanctuary.

whyUseful: Only has Mining Lv3, so it won't get distracted by other tasks. An extremely efficient dedicated miner that drills ore at top speed.
keyTrait: Mining Lv3 (dedicated, no task distractions)

howToGet.details: Desert region around Duneshelter and Sand Dunes areas.

whyUseful: Highest Transporting level at Lv4. Also has Planting, Handiwork, and Lumbering — an excellent multi-role support pal for large farming bases.
keyTrait: Transporting Lv4 (highest in game)

howToGet.details: No. 2 Wildlife Sanctuary (western map edge) or Eastern Wild Island.

whyUseful: Best mid-game electricity generator at Lv3. Also an excellent combat pal — its Gatling Gun Partner Skill lets the player fire a minigun while mounted.
keyTrait: Generating Electricity Lv3 + mounted Gatling Gun

howToGet.details: Breed Mossanda + Rayhound. Also caught at No. 1 Wildlife Sanctuary.

whyUseful: Exceptional all-rounder with Handiwork Lv3, Gathering Lv3, Lumbering Lv3, and Planting Lv3 — one of the best multi-task workers for any base setup.
keyTrait: Handiwork Lv3 + Gathering Lv3 + Lumbering Lv3 + Planting Lv3

howToGet.details: No. 2 Wildlife Sanctuary or Alpha Boss at Sealed Realm of the Swift.

whyUseful: Covers five different work types: Watering Lv3, Mining Lv3, Cooling Lv2, Handiwork Lv2, Transporting Lv2. One of the best mid-game workers available.
keyTrait: 5 work suitabilities — Watering Lv3 + Mining Lv3

howToGet.details: Penking Dungeon (Sealed Realm of the Frozen Wings) or as a roaming Alpha Boss.

whyUseful: Feybreak DLC pal with Planting, Gathering, Medicine Production, Transporting, and Handiwork. Its Partner Skill increases crop yields, making it the best farming support from the DLC.
keyTrait: Planting + crop yield Partner Skill boost

howToGet.details: Feybreak Island (DLC area).

whyUseful: Top-tier Dragon-type legendary. Fastest flying mount in the game and a powerful combat pal with the Aerial Missile Partner Skill that fires rockets while flying.
keyTrait: Highest flight speed + Dragon-type legendary damage

howToGet.details: Legendary Alpha Boss on Mount Obsidian, north of Beach of Everlasting Summer teleport (Level 50).

whyUseful: Top-tier Dark-type with very high attack. Its Partner Skill grants Dark damage to player attacks while mounted, lethal combined with the player's weapons.
keyTrait: Dark-type high ATK + boosts player attacks when mounted

howToGet.details: Breed Kitsun + Astegon. Also caught at No. 3 Wildlife Sanctuary.

whyUseful: Premier Neutral-type legendary with massive HP and DEF. Its 150-power Pal Blast AoE makes it devastating, and it triple-jumps as a ground mount.
keyTrait: Neutral legendary — exceptional survivability + 150-power AoE

howToGet.details: Legendary Alpha Boss near Deep Sand Dunes, coordinates (446, 680). Daytime only.

whyUseful: Dark-type legendary with extreme ATK. Found paired with Paladius. Its Dark damage output rivals any other legendary and it excels as a night-exclusive mount.
keyTrait: Dark-type legendary ATK powerhouse

howToGet.details: Legendary Alpha Boss near Deep Sand Dunes (446, 681). Nocturnal — only active at night.

whyUseful: Top-tier Water/Dragon pal with two 150-power moves (Hydro Laser + Dragon Meteor). Also has Transporting Lv4 for base use — one of the most well-rounded pals.
keyTrait: Dual 150-power moves + Transporting Lv4

howToGet.details: Large lake in the northeast of Palpagos mainland. Also an Alpha Boss in the area.

whyUseful: S-tier Fire-type flying combatant. Deals massive AoE fire damage, applies burn debuffs, and is one of the fastest flying mounts outside of Jetragon.
keyTrait: Fire AoE + fast flying mount

howToGet.details: Breed Vanwyrm + Anubis. Also caught at No. 3 Wildlife Sanctuary.

whyUseful: Dark-type healer that restores HP in combat while dealing Dark damage. Has Handiwork Lv3 and Medicine Production Lv3 for base use too.
keyTrait: Dark-type combat healer + Handiwork Lv3 + Medicine Lv3

howToGet.details: Breed Lyleen + Menasting.

whyUseful: Fire/Dragon DLC legendary added in the Sakurajima update. Extremely high stats — the highest combined offensive stats of any pal in the game.
keyTrait: Fire/Dragon legendary — highest offensive stats in game

howToGet.details: Defeat the Blazamut Ryu Raid Boss (summoned via Summoning Altar). Does not spawn in the wild.

whyUseful: Strong Leaf/Earth hybrid fighter. Solar Blast gives great AoE coverage and Giga Horn provides knockback control. Versatile for both solo and group combat.
keyTrait: Leaf/Earth dual-type with AoE and knockback moves

howToGet.details: Found in forest areas mid-game. Also breedable from Mossanda + Verdash.

whyUseful: The only pal that passively produces Eggs at the Ranch. Eggs are a key ingredient in Cakes needed for breeding — Chikipi is indispensable for any breeding operation.
keyTrait: Passive Egg production at Ranch

howToGet.details: Very common in early areas: Sea Breeze Archipelago, Marsh Island, Eastern Wild Island.

whyUseful: The only pal that passively produces Milk at the Ranch. Milk is a key Cake ingredient, making Mozzarina essential for any sustained breeding program.
keyTrait: Passive Milk production at Ranch

howToGet.details: Northwest island from starting area, east of Sealed Realm of the Thunder Dragon waypoint.

whyUseful: The only pal that passively produces Honey at the Ranch. Honey is the third Cake ingredient — you need all three to breed. Beegarde also has the most work types of any pal (7 total).
keyTrait: Passive Honey production at Ranch

howToGet.details: Mossanda Forest during daytime. Caution — they self-destruct when attacking.

whyUseful: Passively produces Red Berries at the Ranch, providing a stable food supply without needing planted fields. Great for keeping base pals fed automatically.
keyTrait: Passive Red Berry production at Ranch

howToGet.details: Windswept Hills, Eastern Wild Island, Ice Wind Island.

whyUseful: Produces High Quality Cloth directly at the Ranch, bypassing the need to craft it from 10x Wool. Enormously time-efficient for mid-to-late game armor crafting.
keyTrait: Passive High Quality Cloth at Ranch (skips wool conversion)

howToGet.details: Cold/snowy biomes in the Astral Mountains region.

whyUseful: Passively digs up Gold Coins at the Ranch, providing consistent currency income without combat grinding. Mau Cryst does the same and works in cold-biome ranches.
keyTrait: Passive Gold Coin production at Ranch

howToGet.details: Mau found in desert regions near the starting area. Mau Cryst in snowy biomes.

whyUseful: Passively produces Flame Organs at the Ranch, eliminating the need to grind fire-type pals in combat for this key crafting ingredient.
keyTrait: Passive Flame Organ production at Ranch

howToGet.details: Volcanic areas in the southern fire biome of Palpagos Island.

whyUseful: Fastest flying mount in the game — crosses the entire map in under a minute. Fires rockets via its Aerial Missile Partner Skill while flying.
keyTrait: Fastest flying mount in the game

howToGet.details: Legendary Alpha Boss on Mount Obsidian, north of Beach of Everlasting Summer (Level 50).

whyUseful: Second-fastest flying mount, far more accessible than Jetragon via breeding. Ideal for players wanting a fast flyer before reaching endgame.
keyTrait: Fast flying mount — best pre-Jetragon option

howToGet.details: Breed Vanwyrm + Anubis. Most accessible powerful flying mount.

whyUseful: Best ground mount in the game. Triple-jumps and sprints at exceptional speed, making it irreplaceable for overland exploration.
keyTrait: Best ground mount — triple jump + highest sprint speed

howToGet.details: Legendary Alpha Boss near Deep Sand Dunes (446, 680). Daytime only.

whyUseful: Best land mount before obtaining Paladius. Covers rough terrain quickly — excellent for mid-game exploration and bridging the gap to endgame mounts.
keyTrait: Fast land mount (best mid-game ground speed)

howToGet.details: Alpha Boss at Falls Mineshaft (west of Ascetic Falls). Also at No. 3 Wildlife Sanctuary.

whyUseful: Reliable mid-game flying mount with decent speed and Dragon typing. Also has Handiwork Lv2 and Transporting Lv2 — a good all-rounder before endgame flyers.
keyTrait: Accessible mid-game flying mount with base utility

howToGet.details: Mountainous regions in the northeast. Also breedable from common pals.

whyUseful: Fastest water/swimming mount in the game. Essential for traversing oceans quickly, especially for reaching island Wildlife Sanctuaries to catch rare pals.
keyTrait: Fastest swimming/ocean mount

howToGet.details: Breed Jormuntide + Suzaku. Cannot be caught in the wild.

whyUseful: The perfect starter: Handiwork, Transporting, Gathering, and Mining Lv1. Its Partner Skill increases carry weight — solves the early inventory problem immediately.
keyTrait: Carry weight boost Partner Skill + 4 work suitabilities

howToGet.details: Everywhere in starting areas — one of the first pals you encounter.

whyUseful: Covers Planting, Handiwork, Lumbering, Gathering, and Medicine Production Lv1. The Medicine Production suitability is rare among early pals and valuable from the start.
keyTrait: Medicine Production Lv1 + 4 other suitabilities

howToGet.details: Very common across the starting area.

whyUseful: The first pal most players find with Watering (Lv1) to irrigate crops. Has Handiwork, Transporting, and Cooling Lv2 — a surprisingly versatile early pal.
keyTrait: Earliest accessible Watering pal

howToGet.details: Cold/snowy lake areas at the bottom of the Astral Mountains.

whyUseful: Its Partner Skill lets it charge and break rocks while you ride it, effectively replacing your pickaxe. Makes early ore farming trivial.
keyTrait: Mounted rock-breaking — replaces pickaxe early

howToGet.details: Sea Breeze Archipelago, Marsh Island, Windswept Hills.

whyUseful: Best early all-rounder covering Gathering, Lumbering, Handiwork, Planting, and Transporting — all five in one pal. Only early pal that covers that many tasks.
keyTrait: 5 work suitabilities (most of any early game pal)

howToGet.details: Hilly forest areas near the starting zone, day and night.

whyUseful: Earliest Fire pal with Kindling Lv1 to power your first furnace. Its unique flamethrower Partner Skill also makes it one of the most fun early combat companions.
keyTrait: Earliest Kindling pal + flamethrower Partner Skill

howToGet.details: Very common around the Plateau of Beginnings starting area.

whyUseful: One of the most important breeding parents — used to breed Faleris (Vanwyrm + Anubis) and accessible from mid-game pals. Top base worker on its own too.
keyTrait: Key breeding parent for Faleris + Handiwork Lv4 + Mining Lv4

howToGet.details: Breed Penking + Bushi. Accessible in late-mid game.

whyUseful: Prime endgame breeding target. A Shadowbeak with 4 optimized passive skills is the strongest Dark-type combat pal — worth breeding multiple generations to perfect.
keyTrait: Endgame passive-stacking target for best Dark combat pal

howToGet.details: Breed Kitsun + Astegon. Both parents catchable in the wild.

whyUseful: The definitive late-game electricity breeding target. A 4-passive Orserk with Artisan-type passives can replace multiple Grizzbolt and fully power a late-game base alone.
keyTrait: Generating Electricity Lv4 — passive stacking for base automation

howToGet.details: Breed Grizzbolt + Relaxaurus. Both parents easily caught in mid-game.

whyUseful: Best bred support/healer pal in the game. With 4 good passives it heals in combat, excels at Dark damage, and works Handiwork and Medicine Production at base.
keyTrait: Healer + Dark attacker — top passive-stacking support target

howToGet.details: Breed Lyleen + Menasting. Lyleen bred from Mossanda + Petallia.
